purpose: Label direct construction through the aliased public value class (pyreason.label.Label): value/str/repr echo the string; equality and hash are by string value alone (same-text distinct objects compare and hash equal — the mechanism behind predicate-map and world lookups); equality against a plain string raises AttributeError('str' object has no attribute 'get_value') because the pinned __eq__ calls get_value() on its argument before its isinstance guard; and the empty-string label constructs and behaves identically.
provenance: docs/surface.md type:Label construct/equality/hash/get-value (Python-side arms); components/label.py:1-21 at the pin; screened live 2026-07-07 (screen_types.py)
